title: Solar-Harness Refresh Run Result
description: Output schema for solar-harness refresh --json. Exit code semantics: 0=all ok, 1=any error, 2=any degraded (no error), 3=all skipped.

schema.description: Schema version identifier. Must always equal 'refresh.run.v1'.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the refresh run started.

finished_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the refresh run finished.

duration_ms.description: Total wall-time in milliseconds. Max 35000 to accommodate --deep mode (30s + overhead).

scope.description: Ordered list of source names that were executed.

deep.description: Whether --deep mode was active (extends budget to 30s).

sources.description: Per-source result records, one per executed scope.

status.description: ok=healthy, degraded=partial/timeout, skipped=intentionally bypassed, error=unexpected failure.

duration_ms.description: Wall-time for this source in milliseconds.

note.description: Human-readable detail; empty string when status=ok and nothing notable.
